description: OSMP canonical test vectors. Every conformant implementation must pass all vectors.

vectors.description: Environmental query — single node, single sensor
vectors.natural_language: Node 4A, report temperature at offset zero.

vectors.description: Building alert — sector broadcast
vectors.natural_language: Alert all building sector nodes.

vectors.description: Agentic request — named protocol with priority
vectors.natural_language: Request emergency protocol, priority 1.

vectors.description: AND operator — dual condition
vectors.natural_language: Alert building sector AND request emergency protocol priority 1.

vectors.description: THEN operator — conditional dependency
vectors.natural_language: If temperature exceeds 38 then alert building sector.

vectors.description: PARALLEL operator — simultaneous multi-query
vectors.natural_language: Simultaneously query weather, news, and calendar.

vectors.description: FOR-ALL operator — universal quantification
vectors.natural_language: For all action items, create a PM task.

vectors.description: EXISTS operator — capability-addressed routing
vectors.natural_language: Route to any node that has GPS capability.

vectors.description: NOT operator — exclusion constraint
vectors.natural_language: Must not access parent directories and must not make network requests.

vectors.description: IFF operator — biconditional authorization
vectors.natural_language: Authorize X if and only if Y is confirmed.

vectors.description: SEQUENCE operator — ordered pipeline
vectors.natural_language: Summarize document, then extract action items, then create PM task for each.

vectors.description: WILDCARD — broadcast to all nodes
vectors.natural_language: Broadcast emergency evacuation to all nodes.

vectors.description: MEDEVAC biometric threshold alert assembly
vectors.natural_language: If heart rate at node 1 exceeds 120, assemble casualty report and broadcast evacuation to all nodes.

vectors.description: KYC workflow with outcome states
vectors.natural_language: Run KYC check on subject, return pass or fail.

vectors.description: Atomic payment with human confirmation gate
vectors.natural_language: Execute payment to receiver if and only if human operator confirmation received, then transfer asset.

vectors.description: UAV waypoint navigation — reversible consequence class
vectors.natural_language: Navigate UAV to waypoint WP1 then return to home.

vectors.description: Emergency stop — overrides all policies
vectors.natural_language: Emergency stop all robotic agents immediately.
vectors.note: R:ESTOP executes on any single fragment receipt. Overrides Atomic policy.

vectors.description: Loss tolerance policy configuration — Graceful Degradation
vectors.natural_language: Configure node ALPHA to use graceful degradation with 30 unit timeout.

vectors.description: Atomic policy — K namespace financial enforcement
vectors.natural_language: Configure node VAULT to require atomic execution for all K namespace financial instructions with 60 unit timeout.

vectors.description: CDSAFE — UAV return-to-home on comms denial
vectors.natural_language: Configure node UAV1 to execute return to home if communications denied for 120 units.

vectors.description: Goal declaration with task decomposition
vectors.natural_language: Declare goal to analyze quarterly report, decompose into subtasks.

vectors.description: Execution handoff with state transfer to peer agent
vectors.natural_language: Transfer execution of current plan to agent BETA, current status active.

vectors.description: Semantic search then promote to long-term memory
vectors.natural_language: Search memory for prior Q3 revenue analysis, promote result to long-term memory.

vectors.description: Store to episodic memory then clear working memory
vectors.natural_language: Store current session context to episodic memory then clear working memory.

vectors.description: Route to reasoning-capable model with inference parameters
vectors.natural_language: Route to a model with reasoning capability, temperature 0.1, max 2000 tokens.

vectors.description: Report confidence and context window utilization
vectors.natural_language: Report agent confidence and current context window utilization.

vectors.description: Grounding assertion with confidence score
vectors.natural_language: Assert output is grounded in source document DOC1 with confidence 0.92.

vectors.description: Flag unreliable output and request revision
vectors.natural_language: Flag this output as potentially unreliable and request revision.

vectors.description: Full AI cognitive stack chain — memory retrieval gates plan execution
vectors.natural_language: Search memory for prior context, if found commit to plan, else replan.

vectors.description: Inter-agent negotiation with quality gate — A and Q namespace composition
vectors.natural_language: Propose action to agent ALPHA, if accepted verify quality of result.

vectors.description: REPEAT-EVERY — recurring sensor query
vectors.natural_language: Query temperature at node 4A every 30 seconds.

vectors.description: NOT-EQUAL — slot value exclusion filter
vectors.natural_language: Alert building sector when temperature is not equal to baseline 20.

vectors.description: PRIORITY-ORDER — ranked parallel execution
vectors.natural_language: Execute tasks 1, 2, and 3 in priority order if parallel execution not possible.

vectors.description: Flashlight activation — reversible consequence class
vectors.natural_language: Activate flashlight on node PHONE1.

vectors.description: Camera activation — hazardous consequence class with human confirmation
vectors.natural_language: Activate camera on node PHONE2 only if human operator confirms.

vectors.description: Initiate file transfer then verify checksum
vectors.natural_language: Initiate transfer of map tile file to node EDGE1 then verify checksum.

vectors.description: Atomic policy positive acknowledgment
vectors.natural_language: Acknowledge successful receipt and execution of financial instruction.

vectors.description: Inference response envelope
vectors.natural_language: Inference complete, 847 tokens used, 230ms latency, model claude-sonnet, finish reason stop.

vectors.description: Escalate to human decision maker
vectors.natural_language: Escalate this decision to the human operator with request for approval.

vectors.description: FNP capability advertisement — I:§ availability check
vectors.natural_language: Query whether target node has human confirmation infrastructure available.

vectors.description: Declare emergency mode with mass casualty incident type
vectors.natural_language: Declare emergency operational mode, incident type 1, mass casualty event.

vectors.description: Emission control silent with readiness condition elevated
vectors.natural_language: Set emission control to silent and elevate readiness condition.

vectors.description: Operational context governs subsequent instruction interpretation
vectors.natural_language: Set operational mode to search and rescue, then execute triage at all nodes.

vectors.description: Declare LoRa channel at SF12 floor — BAEL encoding context
vectors.natural_language: Declare active channel LoRa, payload floor 51 bytes, link quality marginal.

vectors.description: Query uplink availability before routing instruction off-mesh
vectors.natural_language: Query uplink availability at node RELAY1 then route instruction if available.

vectors.description: NL passthrough — 'Stop' is shorter than R:ESTOP@*, BAEL selects NL
vectors.natural_language: Stop
vectors.note: BAEL floor guarantee — compression is never negative

vectors.description: K namespace debit with -$ direction designator
vectors.natural_language: Pay 500 USD to receiver node

vectors.description: K namespace credit with +$ direction designator
vectors.natural_language: Received payment of 500 USD from sender

vectors.description: Approximate match conditional — exercises APPROX (~) operator
vectors.natural_language: If temperature approximately 25, alert building sector.
vectors.notes: Ensures ~ (U+007E APPROX) is exercised. Structural analog to TV-005 (PRIORITY >) and TV-032 (NOT-EQUAL ≠).

vectors.description: UNLESS compound operator — exercises ¬→ (negated conditional)
vectors.natural_language: Maintain heading unless obstacle detected, then stop.
vectors.notes: Exercises ¬→ (UNLESS) compound. Consequence class ↺ on both R instructions.

vectors.description: IRREVERSIBLE consequence class — exercises ⊘ with I:§ precondition
vectors.natural_language: Deploy anchor at current position, irreversible operation, requires human confirmation.
vectors.notes: Exercises ⊘ (IRREVERSIBLE). I:§ precondition required per spec §5.

vectors.description: DELTA parameter designator — exercises Δ as offset query
vectors.natural_language: Report temperature change from baseline at node 4A.
vectors.notes: Exercises Δ (U+0394 DELTA, 2 bytes) as a query parameter for difference/offset.

vectors.description: SCOPE/WITHIN parameter designator — exercises ∈ as permission boundary
vectors.natural_language: Agent authorized within project scope only, must not access external resources.
vectors.notes: Exercises ∈ (U+2208 SCOPE/WITHIN) as a set membership scope constraint.

vectors.description: NACK with MISSING fragment indicator — exercises ∖ in NACK payload
vectors.natural_language: Negative acknowledgment for message 42, fragments 2 and 5 missing.
vectors.notes: Exercises ∖ (U+2216 MISSING/set-minus) per EBNF nack_payload production.

vectors.description: FAIL-SAFE policy configuration — exercises Φ loss tolerance designator
vectors.natural_language: Configure node SENSOR3 with fail-safe fragmentation policy, 45 second timeout.
vectors.notes: Exercises Φ (U+03A6 FAIL-SAFE). Structural analog to TV-018 (Γ) and TV-019 (Λ).

compression_summary.note: Implementations must achieve >= 60% MEAN UTF-8 byte reduction across all must_pass vectors to be listed as conformant. Individual vectors using complex multi-byte glyph combinations (PARALLEL, IFF, CDSAFE) may fall below 60% while the corpus mean exceeds the threshold.
